name: Catholic Charities USA
description: Immigration legal services, housing assistance, and resettlement support nationwide

name: International Rescue Committee (IRC)
description: Helps refugees and immigrants with resettlement, employment, legal aid, and healthcare

name: ACLU Immigrants Rights Project
description: Legal defense and advocacy for immigrants facing deportation and rights violations

name: UnidosUS
description: Largest Latino civil rights org — education, housing, health, and employment resources

name: National Immigration Legal Services Center
description: Directory of free and low-cost immigration legal services across the US

name: Tennessee Immigrant & Refugee Rights Coalition (TIRRC)
description: Statewide coalition defending the rights of immigrants and refugees in Tennessee

name: World Relief
description: Refugee resettlement, immigration legal services, and community integration support

name: National Council of La Raza
description: Advocates for Latino civil rights — legal, education, housing, and health services

name: Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR)
description: Federal program providing refugees with cash, medical assistance, and resettlement services

name: Legal Aid Society
description: Free civil legal services for low-income immigrants including housing and employment

name: RAICES
description: Free and low-cost legal services for immigrant children, families, and refugees
